description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on workflow dispatch, push to master or v0.23.x branches, and pull requests to those branches, excluding certain paths. The workflow should have read permissions to repository contents. It should have two jobs: build-linux and build-macos. The build-linux job should run on a matrix of ubuntu-22.04 and ubuntu-20.04, with different compilers, and perform a full build, unit tests, and mini build using meson. The build-macos job should run on macos-latest, install dependencies, and perform a build and unit tests using meson.
